---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<nav class="fp-nav">
  <div class="fp-nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="fp-nav-logo">Filip <span>Popovic</span></a>
    <ul class="fp-nav-links">
      <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="about.html" class="active">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="contact.html">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
    <button class="fp-theme-btn" data-theme-toggle aria-label="Toggle dark mode">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="fp-section" style="padding-top: var(--space-20); padding-bottom: var(--space-12);">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <p class="fp-eyebrow">About me</p>
    <h1 style="font-size:var(--text-2xl); margin-bottom: var(--space-6);">Statistics student.<br><em style="color:var(--color-primary);">Data analyst.</em></h1>
    <p style="max-width:60ch; font-size:var(--text-lg); color:var(--color-text-muted); line-height:1.7;">
      I'm Filip Popovic -  a Statistics & Data Science student at the University of Vienna. I help people and businesses make better decisions by turning messy data into clear, actionable answers.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BIO + SKILLS -->
<section class="fp-section" style="padding-top: 0;">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <div class="fp-about-grid">
      <div class="fp-about-text">
        <h2 style="font-size:var(--text-xl); margin-bottom:var(--space-6);">Background</h2>
        <p>I've always been curious about what numbers are really hiding and what you can do with them once you unpack them. Especially when the answer makes someone´s life even a little bit easier.</p>
        <p>For me the best analysis is one that looks so simple and clean, you would think anyone could have done it. Some only see the results. Others will see the work.<p>
        <p>Outside of work, you will find me on a football pitch, at the gym or socialising. Staying curious, whether it is about data or anything else, is what life is about.<p>
        <div style="margin-top:var(--space-8); display:flex; gap:var(--space-3); flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <a href="contact.html" class="btn btn-primary">Work with me</a>
          <a href="projects.html" class="btn btn-outline">See my projects</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <!-- TOOLS -->
        <div style="margin-bottom:var(--space-8);">
          <p style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color-text-faint);margin-bottom:var(--space-4);">Tools & Technologies</p>
          <div class="fp-tools-list">
            <div class="fp-tool-item"><span class="fp-tool-dot"></span>R & RStudio</div>
            <div class="fp-tool-item"><span class="fp-tool-dot"></span>Python</div>
            <div class="fp-tool-item"><span class="fp-tool-dot"></span>SQL</div>
            <div class="fp-tool-item"><span class="fp-tool-dot"></span>Linux</div>
            <div class="fp-tool-item"><span class="fp-tool-dot"></span>LaTeX</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AREAS -->
        <div>
          <p style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color-text-faint);margin-bottom:var(--space-4);">Areas of expertise</p>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:var(--space-2);">
            <span class="fp-skill-chip">Statistical Modelling</span>
            <span class="fp-skill-chip">Data Visualisation</span>
            <span class="fp-skill-chip">Forecasting</span>
            <span class="fp-skill-chip">Data Cleaning & Pipelines</span>
            <span class="fp-skill-chip">Time Series Analysis</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section class="fp-section fp-section-alt">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <h2 style="font-size:var(--text-xl); margin-bottom:var(--space-10);">Education</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:var(--space-8); max-width:720px;">

      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 3fr; gap:var(--space-8); align-items:start;">
        <div>
          <p style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color-text-faint);">2023 — present</p>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h3 style="font-size:var(--text-base); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:var(--space-1);">BSc Statistics & Data Science</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--color-primary); font-size:var(--text-sm); margin-bottom:var(--space-3);">University of Vienna</p>
          <p style="color:var(--color-text-muted); font-size:var(--text-sm);">6th semester. Coursework in time series analysis, regression modelling, multivariate statistics, probability theory, Bayesian inference, and data management. Projects in R, Python, and SQL.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="border-top: 1px solid var(--color-divider); padding-top: var(--space-8); display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 3fr; gap:var(--space-8); align-items:start;">
        <div>
          <p style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color-text-faint);">2013 — 2019</p>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h3 style="font-size:var(--text-base); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:var(--space-1);">Matura (Secondary Education)</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--color-primary); font-size:var(--text-sm); margin-bottom:var(--space-3);">Austria</p>
          <p style="color:var(--color-text-muted); font-size:var(--text-sm);">Focus on mathematics and sciences.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LANGUAGES -->
<section class="fp-section">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <h2 style="font-size:var(--text-xl); margin-bottom:var(--space-8);">Languages</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:var(--space-6); flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:var(--space-1);">
        <span style="font-weight:600;">German</span>
        <span style="font-size:var(--text-sm); color:var(--color-text-muted);">Native</span>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px; background:var(--color-divider);"></div>
      <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:var(--space-1);">
        <span style="font-weight:600;">English</span>
        <span style="font-size:var(--text-sm); color:var(--color-text-muted);">Fluent (professional)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px; background:var(--color-divider);"></div>
      <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:var(--space-1);">
        <span style="font-weight:600;">Croatian/Serbian</span>
        <span style="font-size:var(--text-sm); color:var(--color-text-muted);">Native</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="fp-section fp-section-alt">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <div class="fp-contact-box">
      <h2>Let's work together</h2>
      <p>Available for freelance data analysis projects — from one-off reports to ongoing analysis work.</p>
      <div class="fp-contact-links">
        <a href="contact.html" class="btn btn-primary">Get in touch</a>
        <a href="projects.html" class="btn btn-outline">View my work</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="fp-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Filip Popovic · Vienna, Austria</p>
</footer>

<script>
(function(){
  const t = document.querySelector('[data-theme-toggle]');
  const r = document.documentElement;
  let d = matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
  r.setAttribute('data-theme', d);
  if(t) t.addEventListener('click', () => { d = d === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'; r.setAttribute('data-theme', d); });
})();
</script>
```
